v7_baseline.name: v7_baseline
v7_baseline.description: Scored recovery baseline. Page-level rerank with answer-aware page selection.

v8_quality_branch.name: v8_quality_branch
v8_quality_branch.description: Quality-first branch. Broad page rerank, precomputed segments, and 3-pass voting.

v9_regression.name: v9_regression
v9_regression.description: Regression case. Doc rerank, lazy segments, conditional voting, and runtime governor.

candidate_lazy_segments_v1.name: candidate_lazy_segments_v1
candidate_lazy_segments_v1.description: v7 baseline with locked top-doc search and lazy long-document segments only.

candidate_locked_top_doc_v1.name: candidate_locked_top_doc_v1
candidate_locked_top_doc_v1.description: v7 baseline with all-page search inside the top document only.

candidate_structure_chunks_v1.name: candidate_structure_chunks_v1
candidate_structure_chunks_v1.description: v7 baseline with structure-aware subchunk recall inside the top retrieved documents.

candidate_structure_chunks_v3_short_doc.name: candidate_structure_chunks_v3_short_doc
candidate_structure_chunks_v3_short_doc.description: Structure chunks gated by top-1 doc page count. Threshold=25: all domain_1 docs (min 25 pages) get chunks; 97% of domain_2 docs (<25 pages) skip ALL chunks for that question, preventing cross-domain promotion.

candidate_structure_chunks_v2_doc_guard.name: candidate_structure_chunks_v2_doc_guard
candidate_structure_chunks_v2_doc_guard.description: Structure-chunk candidate with a post-rerank doc-evidence guard to reduce single-page doc swaps.

candidate_page_summary_selector_v1.name: candidate_page_summary_selector_v1
candidate_page_summary_selector_v1.description: v7 baseline with summary-based shortlist selection inside the chosen document.

candidate_avir_threshold_v1.name: candidate_avir_threshold_v1
candidate_avir_threshold_v1.description: v7 baseline with thresholded page shortlist selection inside the chosen document.

candidate_stronger_reranker_v1.name: candidate_stronger_reranker_v1
candidate_stronger_reranker_v1.description: v7 baseline with a stronger page-level reranker only.

candidate_stronger_reranker_v2_fair.name: candidate_stronger_reranker_v2_fair
candidate_stronger_reranker_v2_fair.description: Fair 4B reranker retest: identical to v7_baseline except reranker preference favors qwen3_4b while preserving the baseline page-level rerank budget and context length.

candidate_v5refocus_reranker4b_fair.name: candidate_v5refocus_reranker4b_fair
candidate_v5refocus_reranker4b_fair.description: Fair 4B reranker retest plus the v5_refocus prompt variant. Keeps the v7 rerank budget while combining the strongest fair reranker evidence with the prompt-only attention refocus change.

candidate_stronger_reranker_v3_8b_fair.name: candidate_stronger_reranker_v3_8b_fair
candidate_stronger_reranker_v3_8b_fair.description: Fair 8B reranker retest: identical to v7_baseline except reranker preference favors qwen3_8b while preserving the baseline page-level rerank budget and context length.

candidate_stronger_reranker_v3_8b_feasib.name: candidate_stronger_reranker_v3_8b_feasibility
candidate_stronger_reranker_v3_8b_feasib.description: Feasibility-only 8B reranker lane for March 30, 2026. Same single-GPU pipeline target as the fair 8B preset, but report only as feasibility evidence rather than a trusted fair ablation until end-to-end compatibility and runtime are confirmed.

candidate_conditional_voting_v1.name: candidate_conditional_voting_v1
candidate_conditional_voting_v1.description: v7 baseline with 1-pass default and 3-pass only for ambiguous or long-doc cases.

candidate_runtime_guard_v1.name: candidate_runtime_guard_v1
candidate_runtime_guard_v1.description: v7-first candidate with runtime governor enabled.

candidate_confidence_gated_v1.name: candidate_confidence_gated_v1
candidate_confidence_gated_v1.description: v7 baseline with confidence-gated 1-pass only for easy cases.

candidate_hybrid_rrf_v1.name: candidate_hybrid_rrf_v1
candidate_hybrid_rrf_v1.description: v7 baseline with BM25 plus dense retrieval fused by reciprocal rank fusion.

candidate_extraction_blocks_v1.name: candidate_extraction_blocks_v1
candidate_extraction_blocks_v1.description: v7 baseline with ordered block extraction and table-aware text recovery.

candidate_no_bleed_v1.name: candidate_no_bleed_v1
candidate_no_bleed_v1.description: Faithfulness ablation with neighbor-page bleed disabled.

candidate_evidence_first_v1.name: candidate_evidence_first_v1
candidate_evidence_first_v1.description: Faithfulness ablation with answer conditioning disabled during page localization.

candidate_dense_doc_lock_v1.name: candidate_dense_doc_lock_v1
candidate_dense_doc_lock_v1.description: Lock final doc to dense retrieval top-1 doc for ALL questions. Prevents page reranker from demoting correct docs. Dense recall@1=0.910 vs reranker final_doc recall@1=0.833 on fold1 (-7.7pp gap). Blanket lock; domain_2 loses some reranker benefit.

candidate_dense_doc_lock_v2.name: candidate_dense_doc_lock_v2
candidate_dense_doc_lock_v2.description: Lock final doc to dense top-1 ONLY for long docs (>=25 pages = domain_1 proxy). All domain_1 docs have >=25 pages; 97% of domain_2 docs have <25 pages. Domain_1 analysis: reranker always hurts (-2.6pp to -13.9pp across splits). Domain_2: reranker helps in fold0 (+5.7pp) and lockbox (+3.6pp). Conditional lock: fixes domain_1 doc flips while preserving domain_2 reranker benefits.

candidate_dense_doc_lock_v3.name: candidate_dense_doc_lock_v3
candidate_dense_doc_lock_v3.description: Same as v2 but threshold=27. Fixes 3 lockbox questions (Q95, Q315, Q362) and 1 fold1 question (Q290) where domain_2 doc d80178 (26 pages) was incorrectly locked by v2's threshold=25. All domain_1 docs in dev splits have >=27 pages (min used=27 in fold0). No domain_1 gains lost.

candidate_dense_doc_lock_v3_reranker4b_f.name: candidate_dense_doc_lock_v3_reranker4b_fair
candidate_dense_doc_lock_v3_reranker4b_f.description: Dense doc lock v3 with the fair 4B reranker budget. Keeps the doc-lock heuristic from candidate_dense_doc_lock_v3 but swaps in qwen3_4b under the same 2048-token rerank context used by v7_baseline.

candidate_v5refocus_ddl_v3_reranker4b_fa.name: candidate_v5refocus_ddl_v3_reranker4b_fair
candidate_v5refocus_ddl_v3_reranker4b_fa.description: Dense doc lock v3 plus the fair 4B reranker and the v5_refocus prompt variant. This is the highest-signal balanced combination of the current doc-lock, prompt, and reranker gains.

candidate_chat_template_v1.name: candidate_chat_template_v1
candidate_chat_template_v1.description: NEGATIVE: Dense doc lock v3 + chat template without system prompt. HURTS: fold0=0, fold1=-0.028. Root cause: model starts responses with Ukrainian conjunction 'А' which extract_answer maps to Latin 'A', causing 5/6 losses to switch to wrong A. DO NOT USE.

candidate_chat_template_v2.name: candidate_chat_template_v2
candidate_chat_template_v2.description: NEGATIVE: Dense doc lock v3 + chat template with system prompt. fold0=+0.002, fold1=-0.009. Still slightly worse than raw completion. Root cause: chat mode generates variable-length responses; bias depends on system prompt's last letter ('F' in v2). Raw completion with 'Правильний варіант:' is more reliable. DO NOT USE.

candidate_ddl_v3_exhaustive.name: candidate_ddl_v3_exhaustive
candidate_ddl_v3_exhaustive.description: Dense doc lock v3 + exhaustive BGE-M3 page scoring within the locked domain_1 doc. Instead of only using pages in the global top-K retrieval, scores ALL pages of the locked doc by dense similarity and sorts them. Fixes cases where the answer page is missed by global top-20 retrieval (e.g., Q395: answer on page 75 of 76-page doc, never retrieved globally).

candidate_v5_refocus_v1.name: candidate_v5_refocus_v1
candidate_v5_refocus_v1.description: v7 baseline with v5_refocus prompt variant: repeats the question right before 'Правильний варіант:' instead of 'Знайди відповідний фрагмент тексту'. Attention-refocusing technique for long-context MCQ. fold0=+0.0016, fold1=+0.0036, lockbox=+0.0156.

candidate_dense_margin_lock_v1.name: candidate_dense_margin_lock_v1
candidate_dense_margin_lock_v1.description: Lock final doc to dense top-1 only when the dense top-1 vs top-2 score margin exceeds 0.25. Uses retrieval confidence instead of page-count as the lock condition to reduce domain-proxy brittleness on unseen domains.

candidate_v5refocus_margin_lock_v1.name: candidate_v5refocus_margin_lock_v1
candidate_v5refocus_margin_lock_v1.description: Dense margin lock v1 plus the v5_refocus prompt variant. Combines the safer dense-confidence doc lock with the positive prompt-only attention refocus change.

candidate_lapalm_v1.name: candidate_lapalm_v1
candidate_lapalm_v1.description: Dense doc lock v3 with LapaLLM v0.1.2-instruct-Q4_K_M instead of MamayLM. LapaLLM is also Gemma3-12B based but fine-tuned on Ukrainian corpus with custom Ukrainian tokenizer (lapa-llm/tokenizer). Better Ukrainian tokenization may improve comprehension of Ukrainian document text. Updated March 14, 2026.
